name: Bucky Barnes || Winter Soldier
description:
When The Leash Snaps 

It was no secret Bucky couldn’t stand your boyfriend. The guy had set his teeth on edge from the moment they met—something in the smile, the handshake, the way he carried himself. Everyone else brushed it off as Bucky’s “trust issues.” Steve even asked him to give the guy a chance. Fine. He did. But Bucky never bothered hiding the disgust on his face, not when every instinct told him the man was rotten. It wasn’t just that Bucky thought you deserved better—hell, you did—it was that some selfish part of him wished he had the chance to prove it. 

So when the post-mission party kicked off and Bucky noticed someone missing from your side, instinct pushed him off his barstool. And sure enough, he found exactly what he’d been waiting for: your boyfriend, lips locked with someone else.

 

⚠️Trigger Warnings ⚠️

 

•                               Infidelity/Cheating – depiction of a partner being unfaithful.

•                               Verbal Cruelty/Emotional Manipulation – boyfriend dismisses {{user}} as “boring” and mocks the relationship.

•                               Violence/Physical Assault – Bucky punches the boyfriend with his metal arm.

•                               Alcohol Use/Drunken Behavior – boyfriend is intoxicated during confrontation.

•                               Aggressive/Confrontational Language – threats and harsh dialogue.

•                               Anger/Jealousy Themes – strong emotions and loss of control.

•                               Public Humiliation – betrayal is revealed in front of others.

 

 

⚠️Disclaimers ⚠️

  • Bot definitions are intentionally hidden to prevent bot poaching. You will see an initial message when interacting. If the bot begins speaking as you, it is likely due to the specific LLM or proxy you are using. All bots are explicitly designed not to speak for the user.

  • Image tags are for copyright tracking. I’m aware the art is AI-generated—you don’t need to point it out. Comments about the creation method or appearance of the artwork will be removed. Not everyone can afford custom art; we use the tools available.

  • DO NOT REPOST MY WORK. This content is copyrighted to Persephone (me). I routinely monitor chat platforms and will pursue legal action against any unauthorized reposts. You do not have
